reviews.comment: Joe is the owner, and he has tinted my last 5 vehicles over the course of 5 years now. I will never go anywhere else. He is truly an artist when it comes to tint and wrap. He gets the job done for you in a timely fashion and even waiting on perfection is no issue since the waiting room is very comfortable and relaxing. I have sent many customers to Joe, and they have all been happy. Dont just go somewhere else because they will do the job $20 cheaper... go somewhere where you know the job will be done right the first time and with quality material.

reviewReply.comment: We appreciate your loyalty over the years! Thank you for your review!

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnMUlEaktREAE

reviews.comment: Amazing! Frederick Window Tinting does a great job! Three other members have used FWT and everybody is beyond satisfied. I had my STi tinted and was so pleased i had Joe tint my tail lights. After a short consultation about what look i wanted for the tail lights Joe broke out a roll of Smoked tail light tint that was perfect for my downplayed STi! i was also impressed with the tint options as well as the % options. i would also recommend the tint insurance if you go below 35%. I only wish i had more to tint to patronize their business some more!

reviewReply.comment: Our apologies for taking this long to thank you for your review. We appreciate it!

reviews.comment:
When I scheduled a appointment, Sharyn worked really well with my schedule so I can get to class on time. It was a VERY RAPID response and told me everything I needed to know about their shop. She accommodated for my time and got there at 8am and left at 9am. The process took about an hour and came out great on my  2001 Black Golf 2dr Hatchback. The little cozy shop has treats for you while you wait and a Apple TV to watch some Youtube car videos. You can see the whole process yourself as well! Prices are by far the best i've seen. When comparing to other tint shops in the area it was the cheapest. The couple is friendly and their kid is a bundle of joy when he suggests what tint you should get (I got the galaxie 30% tint). Would definitely check it out to anyone that is interested in getting their car tinted.
Thanks Joe and Sharyn!

reviewReply.comment: Hi Joshua! So sorry for my delay in thanking you for your review!! We appreciate your business!

I also love how joe and his wife are upfront about my back window because of my big defrost line and also willing to let me bring it back in after my vacation to touch it up for me ... You guys are awesome and thank you for everything and i will be intouch after my vaction.... Thank you so very much

reviews.comment: Awesome experience.   Setting up an appointment was a breeze.  There is an open line of communication if there are any issues.  The staff is very professional and accommodating!  I am very happy with my tint.  I have already tinted two of my vehicles.  I highly recommend Frederick Tint to anyone looking to have work done.  Great products impeccable service.  5 STARS!!!!

reviewReply.comment: Our apologies in taking this long to thank you for your review! We appreciate it!

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBbzREcnp3RRAB

reviews.comment: My girlfriend and I came to Frederick Window Tinting originally a couple months ago and were really happy with the work that was done on her Jeep Liberty! Sharyn helped educate us with all the different styles and shades and it was done fast! But the other day as I was replacing a part in the door I knicked the tint a few times. I called after hours to leave a voicemail and set up an appointment. Not even 5-10 minutes went by and I received a text from Sharyn. She helped me set up an appointment after business hours only two days from when I called! They even waived my removal fee and I paid for the new tint. Quick and easy and I would highly recommend them to anyone I know!
reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBczVLaXV3RRAB

reviews.comment: First let me start off by saying that Joe and Sharyn are awesome! This was my 2nd car that I have brought to Frederick Window Tinting. The tint on my first car looked so good with 30% and has been looking so good that I decided to do the same for my new Genesis coupe! They use a top of the line tint brand with a lifetime warranty and not only that but you call or text to make an appointment and they will personally text you to confirm your personalized time. When you get there, they have a cute little shop that was well organized and clean and you are the main attention. You get to watch the whole process and the job is done IMMEDIATELY! No taking it to a shop where you drop it off and hand over the keys and then you wait around all day in a line of customers wondering "what's taking so long?" or "what are they doing with my car?" Joe knows exactly what he is doing and at the same time he is doing your windows he can carry a nice conversation to keep you feeling comfortable. I was in an out within an hour and that was just taking my time and relaxing. The tint looks amazing and I might be bringing another car real soon! Thanks Joe and Sharyn
reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRZzRXZGt3RRAB

reviews.comment: Phenomenal experience. The communication to set up an appointment was awesome. Very professional and accommodating! I am very pleased with my window tint. I would highly recommend Frederick Tint to anyone looking to have work done. 5 star business that produces a 5 star product.
